## Source (for research-driven features)


## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run build` green · `npm run lint` clean on touched files · `npm test` green
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new pure logic
- [ ] `docs/TICKETS.md` ticket appended (if user-facing)
- [ ] `docs/diagrams/uml.mdx` updated (if data model / components / sync changed)
- [ ] Schema docs updated (`docs/data-engineering/schema.sql`, `docker/initdb.sql`) if a persisted type changed
- [ ] `docs/WORKLOG.md` / session prompt dump updated (end of a working session)
- [ ] Re-aliased `bujo-journal.vercel.app` after deploy (if deployed)
